channel.title: Retro Pixel Press
channel.description: Fresh takes for retro game collectors and speedrunners.

item.title: Resurrecting the 8-Bit Beast: A Guide to Restoring NES Consoles
item.description: Breathe new life into your old NES console

item.title: Optimizing Retro Consoles for Speed
item.description: Boost your retro console's performance

item.title: Upgrade Your Childhood: DIY Retro Console Upgrades
item.description: Unlock new life from old consoles

item.title: Mod Your Way to Victory: Essential Tools for Retro Console Modding
item.description: Upgrade your retro console with these must-have tools.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your hardware in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying hardware project for retro game collectors — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/retrogaming is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the indie community this week.

item.title: The preservation checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified preservation purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of speedruns
item.description: The most common early stumbles in speedruns, and the cheap corrections that fix them for retro game collectors and speedrunners.

item.title: "retro game restoration" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about retro game restoration through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: Retro Hardware Hacks for Faster Speedruns
item.description: Boost your speedrun performance

item.title: Speed Demons: How to Supercharge Your Rig
item.description: Supercharge your speedrun setup

item.title: Myth vs. reality: retro game restoration
item.description: The persistent myths around retro game restoration, stress-tested against what retro game collectors and speedrunners actually report.

item.title: Breathe New Life into Your Retro Console
item.description: Upgrade your retro console for better performance

item.title: Fixing the Unfixable: DIY Retro Controller Repair for Speedrunners
item.description: Revive your retro controllers with DIY repair

item.title: Ask the forge: your indie questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the indie questions retro game collectors and speedrunners keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in preservation with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest preservation adjustments that retro game collectors and speedrunners report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: crt setup guide
item.description: The persistent myths around crt setup guide, stress-tested against what retro game collectors and speedrunners actually report.

item.description: Breathe new life into retro consoles

item.description: Get ahead with custom controls

item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about hidden snes gems through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.
